title: inputs not the same size
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, test_table_id INTEGER REFERENCES test_table(id), description TEXT);
key_bug_features: mismatched input sizes in join operations
